story_beats.label: Training yard, Sebastian visits as miniboss
Corridors to throne hall, Sebastian looks ill
First major brawl with Adrian and Torvin warband vs goblins
Weak cleansing skill manifests in live battle

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: Festival morning in Sharuan. Before the throne-room audience, Sherward drifts into memory and walks his city in disguise.

voice_keys.speaker: Adalin
voice_keys.text: You still pick up fallen apples before you pick up titles, my prince.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: In his chamber he studies the map: Lorena, Argelia, Doren, Zarandia, and the crimson threat of Krimora.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: His hands shake, grape juice spills over formal trousers, and he changes outfits before rushing through the laundry wing.

voice_keys.speaker: Darius
voice_keys.text: Steady breath, Sherward. A crown tests fear before it tests strength.

voice_keys.speaker: Darius
voice_keys.text: Before kings and bloodlines, there was only order, and the fracture that made Noctus.

voice_keys.speaker: The Almighty
voice_keys.text: Noctus, you are cast from light. Leave this heaven and carry your own darkness.

voice_keys.speaker: Noctus
voice_keys.text: Then I return as dread, and dread will kneel to me.

voice_keys.speaker: Sebastian
voice_keys.text: You are late. I heard about your plans after coronation... and this Adalin.

voice_keys.speaker: Sherward
voice_keys.text: I will rule with duty and love together. I will not be forced to choose one truth over the other.

voice_keys.speaker: Sebastian
voice_keys.text: Sebastian enters the yard as a live boss check: one exchange, no excuses, no ceremony.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: By the throne, the same man looks older. His shoulders are iron, but his breath is not.

voice_keys.speaker: Sebastian
voice_keys.text: Power is expensive, son. I paid with blood and years.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: The argument breaks. Sherward launches from the walls, forcing wings and will to answer fear.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: The sky turns red. He falls hard into the Krimorian woods.

voice_keys.speaker: Krimora
voice_keys.text: Welcome, oathborn prince. Bleed, and this forest will learn your name.

voice_keys.speaker: Adrian
voice_keys.text: Break it and move. Krimora hunts hesitation first.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: Together they reach the dwarven entrance: stone gates carved with old craft marks.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: Beyond lie vault sectors of treasure, forge chambers, and a beast-yard of gem-born hybrids.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: At the center rises a cavern throne hall so vast that Sharuan's throne room seems modest beside it.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: Memory fades after the first campaigns of training. The real road starts now.

tutorial_banners.text_default: Walk a few steps, keep your aim stable, and read the environment before rushing forward.
Use Action near context objects, and track important people, places, and events through the Codex.
Block with Q, attack with context-sensitive strikes, and keep stamina for recovery moves.

events.title: Opening Memory: Sherward's Origin Arc
events.details: Sherward recalls his final morning before exile: Adalin, Sebastian, Krimora, Adrian, and the dwarven gate.

events.title: Crash-Landing in Krimora
events.details: After learning to fly in panic, Sherward falls into the crimson forests of Krimora.

events.title: Training Roster Confirmed
events.details: Training is tracked as Codex material: Adrian + Darius as trainers, stone armors + Sebastian as boss checks.

events.title: First Major Brawl
events.details: Post-cave engagement where Sherward, Adrian, and Torvin hold against goblin forces.

events.title: First Cleansing Cast
events.details: A weak cleansing skill appears in live combat and stabilizes the allied line.

characters.title: Sherward
characters.details: Heir torn between duty and defiance, entering the world through memory and collapse.

characters.title: Sebastian
characters.details: Sherward's father: formidable in the yard, visibly fading in the throne hall.

characters.title: Darius
characters.details: Ancient elf elder with a youthful face, carrying the long memory of creation.

characters.title: Adalin
characters.details: A grounding light in Sherward's memories, met at the market in secret.

characters.title: Adrian
characters.details: Captured in Krimora's forest and freed at the edge of the dwarven routes.

characters.title: Krimora (The Red Death)
characters.details: A crimson force whose anger ignites like flame, and whose forests consume fear.

characters.title: Noctus
characters.details: An exiled dark face in the mythic memory of paradise.

characters.title: Torvin
characters.details: Commander of the dwarf detachment that joins Sherward and Adrian in the first large battle.

locations.title: Sharuan Port Market
locations.details: Crowded waterfront district where Sherward moves in disguise before the court summons him.

locations.title: Prince Chamber
locations.details: Private royal room where Darius delivers the cosmology of the world.

locations.title: Sharuan Forest Bridge
locations.details: A bridge over the stream inside Sherward's dreamlike memory forest.

locations.title: Throne Hall of Sharuan
locations.details: Seat of visible power, where Sebastian's strength shows cracks.

locations.title: Krimora Forest
locations.details: Crimson skies, burgundy shadows, and predatory silence after the crash-landing.

locations.title: Dwarven Caves
locations.details: Vaulted chambers of treasure, forges, hybrid gemstone beasts, and a colossal central throne hall.

factions.title: House Sherward
factions.details: Royal bloodline split by expectation, fear, and inherited losses.

factions.title: Krimora Forces
factions.details: Encroaching influence that reshapes both land and mind.

factions.title: Dwarven Courts
factions.details: Craft-houses and treasure wardens of the deep stone realms.

factions.title: Dwarven Expedition Warband
factions.details: Combat-ready dwarven unit led by Torvin during early anti-goblin operations.

tutorial.title: Training Protocol: Four Trials
tutorial.details: Training includes two trainers (Adrian, Darius) and two boss-level checks (stone armors, Sebastian).

tutorial.title: Weak Cleansing Unlocked
tutorial.details: Early cleanse removes light corruption only; designed as a starter support tool.
